root_text.an4.184:1.1: Atha kho jāṇussoṇi brāhmaṇo yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavatā saddhiṁ sammodi.
root_text.an4.184:1.2: Sammodanīyaṁ kathaṁ sāraṇīyaṁ vītisāretvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho jāṇussoṇi brāhmaṇo bhagavantaṁ etadavoca:
root_text.an4.184:2.2: ‘natthi yo maraṇadhammo samāno na bhāyati, na santāsaṁ āpajjati maraṇassā’”ti.
root_text.an4.184:2.3: “Atthi, brāhmaṇa, maraṇadhammo samāno bhāyati, santāsaṁ āpajjati maraṇassa;
root_text.an4.184:2.4: atthi pana, brāhmaṇa, maraṇadhammo samāno na bhāyati, na santāsaṁ āpajjati maraṇassa.
root_text.an4.184:3.1: Katamo ca, brāhmaṇa, maraṇadhammo samāno bhāyati, santāsaṁ āpajjati maraṇassa?
root_text.an4.184:3.2: Idha, brāhmaṇa, ekacco kāmesu avītarāgo hoti avigatacchando avigatapemo avigatapipāso avigatapariḷāho avigatataṇho.
root_text.an4.184:3.4: Tassa aññatarena gāḷhena rogātaṅkena phuṭṭhassa evaṁ hoti:
root_text.an4.184:3.5: ‘piyā vata maṁ kāmā jahissanti, piye cāhaṁ kāme jahissāmī’ti.
root_text.an4.184:3.6: So socati kilamati paridevati, urattāḷiṁ kandati, sammohaṁ āpajjati.
root_text.an4.184:3.7: Ayaṁ kho, brāhmaṇa, maraṇadhammo samāno bhāyati, santāsaṁ āpajjati maraṇassa.
root_text.an4.184:4.1: Puna caparaṁ, brāhmaṇa, idhekacco kāye avītarāgo hoti avigatacchando avigatapemo avigatapipāso avigatapariḷāho avigatataṇho.
root_text.an4.184:4.3: Tassa aññatarena gāḷhena rogātaṅkena phuṭṭhassa evaṁ hoti:
root_text.an4.184:4.4: ‘piyo vata maṁ kāyo jahissati, piyañcāhaṁ kāyaṁ jahissāmī’ti.
root_text.an4.184:4.5: So socati kilamati paridevati, urattāḷiṁ kandati, sammohaṁ āpajjati.
root_text.an4.184:4.6: Ayampi kho, brāhmaṇa, maraṇadhammo samāno bhāyati, santāsaṁ āpajjati maraṇassa.
root_text.an4.184:5.1: Puna caparaṁ, brāhmaṇa, idhekacco akatakalyāṇo hoti akatakusalo akatabhīruttāṇo katapāpo kataluddo katakibbiso.
root_text.an4.184:5.3: Tassa aññatarena gāḷhena rogātaṅkena phuṭṭhassa evaṁ hoti:
root_text.an4.184:5.4: ‘akataṁ vata me kalyāṇaṁ, akataṁ kusalaṁ, akataṁ bhīruttāṇaṁ;
root_text.an4.184:5.5: kataṁ pāpaṁ, kataṁ luddaṁ, kataṁ kibbisaṁ.
root_text.an4.184:5.6: Yāvatā, bho, akatakalyāṇānaṁ akatakusalānaṁ akatabhīruttāṇānaṁ katapāpānaṁ kataluddānaṁ katakibbisānaṁ gati taṁ gatiṁ pecca gacchāmī’ti.
root_text.an4.184:5.7: So socati kilamati paridevati, urattāḷiṁ kandati, sammohaṁ āpajjati.
root_text.an4.184:5.8: Ayampi kho, brāhmaṇa, maraṇadhammo samāno bhāyati, santāsaṁ āpajjati maraṇassa.
root_text.an4.184:6.1: Puna caparaṁ, brāhmaṇa, idhekacco kaṅkhī hoti vicikicchī aniṭṭhaṅgato saddhamme.
root_text.an4.184:6.3: Tassa aññatarena gāḷhena rogātaṅkena phuṭṭhassa evaṁ hoti:
root_text.an4.184:6.5: So socati kilamati paridevati, urattāḷiṁ kandati, sammohaṁ āpajjati.
root_text.an4.184:6.6: Ayampi kho, brāhmaṇa, maraṇadhammo samāno bhāyati, santāsaṁ āpajjati maraṇassa.
root_text.an4.184:6.7: Ime kho, brāhmaṇa, cattāro maraṇadhammā samānā bhāyanti, santāsaṁ āpajjanti maraṇassa.
root_text.an4.184:7.1: Katamo ca, brāhmaṇa, maraṇadhammo samāno na bhāyati, na santāsaṁ āpajjati maraṇassa?
root_text.an4.184:7.2: Idha, brāhmaṇa, ekacco kāmesu vītarāgo hoti vigatacchando vigatapemo vigatapipāso vigatapariḷāho vigatataṇho.
root_text.an4.184:7.4: Tassa aññatarena gāḷhena rogātaṅkena phuṭṭhassa na evaṁ hoti:
root_text.an4.184:7.5: ‘piyā vata maṁ kāmā jahissanti, piye cāhaṁ kāme jahissāmī’ti.
root_text.an4.184:7.6: So na socati na kilamati na paridevati, na urattāḷiṁ kandati, na sammohaṁ āpajjati.
root_text.an4.184:7.7: Ayaṁ kho, brāhmaṇa, maraṇadhammo samāno na bhāyati, na santāsaṁ āpajjati maraṇassa.
root_text.an4.184:8.1: Puna caparaṁ, brāhmaṇa, idhekacco kāye vītarāgo hoti vigatacchando vigatapemo vigatapipāso vigatapariḷāho vigatataṇho.
root_text.an4.184:8.3: Tassa aññatarena gāḷhena rogātaṅkena phuṭṭhassa na evaṁ hoti:
root_text.an4.184:8.4: ‘piyo vata maṁ kāyo jahissati, piyañcāhaṁ kāyaṁ jahissāmī’ti.
root_text.an4.184:8.5: So na socati na kilamati na paridevati, na urattāḷiṁ kandati, na sammohaṁ āpajjati.
root_text.an4.184:8.6: Ayampi kho, brāhmaṇa, maraṇadhammo samāno na bhāyati, na santāsaṁ āpajjati maraṇassa.
root_text.an4.184:9.1: Puna caparaṁ, brāhmaṇa, idhekacco akatapāpo hoti akataluddo akatakibbiso katakalyāṇo katakusalo katabhīruttāṇo.
root_text.an4.184:9.3: Tassa aññatarena gāḷhena rogātaṅkena phuṭṭhassa evaṁ hoti:
root_text.an4.184:9.4: ‘akataṁ vata me pāpaṁ, akataṁ luddaṁ, akataṁ kibbisaṁ;
root_text.an4.184:9.5: kataṁ kalyāṇaṁ, kataṁ kusalaṁ, kataṁ bhīruttāṇaṁ.
root_text.an4.184:9.6: Yāvatā, bho, akatapāpānaṁ akataluddānaṁ akatakibbisānaṁ katakalyāṇānaṁ katakusalānaṁ katabhīruttāṇānaṁ gati taṁ gatiṁ pecca gacchāmī’ti.
root_text.an4.184:9.7: So na socati na kilamati na paridevati, na urattāḷiṁ kandati, na sammohaṁ āpajjati.
root_text.an4.184:9.8: Ayampi kho, brāhmaṇa, maraṇadhammo samāno na bhāyati, na santāsaṁ āpajjati maraṇassa.
root_text.an4.184:10.1: Puna caparaṁ, brāhmaṇa, idhekacco akaṅkhī hoti avicikicchī niṭṭhaṅgato saddhamme.
root_text.an4.184:10.3: Tassa aññatarena gāḷhena rogātaṅkena phuṭṭhassa evaṁ hoti:
root_text.an4.184:10.5: So na socati na kilamati na paridevati, na urattāḷiṁ kandati, na sammohaṁ āpajjati.
root_text.an4.184:10.6: Ayampi kho, brāhmaṇa, maraṇadhammo samāno na bhāyati, na santāsaṁ āpajjati maraṇassa.
root_text.an4.184:10.7: Ime kho, brāhmaṇa, cattāro maraṇadhammā samānā na bhāyanti, na santāsaṁ āpajjanti maraṇassā”ti.
root_text.an4.184:11.1: “Abhikkantaṁ, bho gotama, abhikkantaṁ, bho gotama …pe… upāsakaṁ maṁ bhavaṁ gotamo dhāretu ajjatagge pāṇupetaṁ saraṇaṁ gatan”ti.

translation_text.an4.184:1.1: Then the brahmin Jānussoṇi went up to the Buddha, and exchanged greetings with him.
translation_text.an4.184:1.2: When the greetings and polite conversation were over, he sat down to one side and said to the Buddha:
translation_text.an4.184:2.1: “Worthy Gotama, this is my doctrine and view:
translation_text.an4.184:2.2: ‘All those liable to death are frightened and terrified of death.’”
translation_text.an4.184:2.3: “Brahmin, some of those liable to death are frightened and terrified of death.
translation_text.an4.184:2.4: But some of those liable to death are not frightened and terrified of death.
translation_text.an4.184:3.1: Who are those frightened of death?
translation_text.an4.184:3.2: It’s someone who isn’t free of greed, desire, fondness, thirst, passion, and craving for sensual pleasures.
translation_text.an4.184:3.5: ‘The sensual pleasures that I love so much will leave me, and I’ll leave them.’
translation_text.an4.184:3.6: They sorrow and wail and lament, beating their breast and falling into confusion.
translation_text.an4.184:3.7: This is someone who is frightened of death.
translation_text.an4.184:4.1: Furthermore, it’s someone who isn’t free of greed, desire, fondness, thirst, passion, and craving for the body.
translation_text.an4.184:4.4: ‘This body that I love so much will leave me, and I’ll leave it.’
translation_text.an4.184:4.5: They sorrow and wail and lament, beating their breast and falling into confusion.
translation_text.an4.184:4.6: This, too, is someone who is frightened of death.
translation_text.an4.184:5.1: Furthermore, it’s someone who hasn’t done good and skillful things that keep them safe, but has done bad things, violence and sin.
translation_text.an4.184:5.4: ‘Well, I haven’t done good and skillful things that keep me safe.
translation_text.an4.184:5.5: And I have done bad things, violence and sin.
translation_text.an4.184:5.6: When I depart, I’ll go to the place where people who’ve done such things go.’
translation_text.an4.184:5.7: They sorrow and wail and lament, beating their breast and falling into confusion.
translation_text.an4.184:5.8: This, too, is someone who is frightened of death.
translation_text.an4.184:6.1: Furthermore, it’s someone who’s doubtful, uncertain, and undecided about the true teaching.
translation_text.an4.184:6.4: ‘I’m doubtful, uncertain, and undecided about the true teaching.’
translation_text.an4.184:6.5: They sorrow and wail and lament, beating their breast and falling into confusion.
translation_text.an4.184:6.6: This, too, is someone who is frightened of death.
translation_text.an4.184:6.7: These are the four individuals liable to death who are frightened and terrified of death.
translation_text.an4.184:7.1: Who are those not frightened of death?
translation_text.an4.184:7.2: It’s someone who is rid of greed, desire, fondness, thirst, passion, and craving for sensual pleasures.
translation_text.an4.184:7.5: ‘The sensual pleasures that I love so much will leave me, and I’ll leave them.’
translation_text.an4.184:7.6: They don’t sorrow and wail and lament, beating their breast and falling into confusion.
translation_text.an4.184:7.7: This is someone who’s not frightened of death.
translation_text.an4.184:8.1: Furthermore, it’s someone who is rid of greed, desire, fondness, thirst, passion, and craving for the body.
translation_text.an4.184:8.4: ‘This body that I love so much will leave me, and I’ll leave it.’
translation_text.an4.184:8.5: They don’t sorrow and wail and lament, beating their breast and falling into confusion.
translation_text.an4.184:8.6: This, too, is someone who’s not frightened of death.
translation_text.an4.184:9.1: Furthermore, it’s someone who hasn’t done bad things, violence and sin, but has done good and skillful deeds that keep them safe.
translation_text.an4.184:9.4: ‘Well, I haven’t done bad things, violence and sin.
translation_text.an4.184:9.5: And I have done good and skillful deeds that keep me safe.
translation_text.an4.184:9.6: When I depart, I’ll go to the place where people who’ve done such things go.’
translation_text.an4.184:9.7: They don’t sorrow and wail and lament, beating their breast and falling into confusion.
translation_text.an4.184:9.8: This, too, is someone who’s not frightened of death.
translation_text.an4.184:10.1: Furthermore, it’s someone who’s not doubtful, uncertain, or undecided about the true teaching.
translation_text.an4.184:10.4: ‘I’m not doubtful, uncertain, or undecided about the true teaching.’
translation_text.an4.184:10.5: They don’t sorrow and wail and lament, beating their breast and falling into confusion.
translation_text.an4.184:10.6: This, too, is someone who’s not frightened of death.
translation_text.an4.184:10.7: These are the four individuals liable to death who are not frightened and terrified of death.”
translation_text.an4.184:11.1: “Excellent, worthy Gotama! … From this day forth, may the worthy Gotama remember me as a lay follower who has gone for refuge for life.”
